jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd!
